query: I will be folding laundry right after the wash, so I want the living room set for a show and the utility area cozy for comfort. At 6:40 PM, which is exactly 24 minutes after washer 1 in the utility room finishes, turn on TV 1 in the living room and start playing a relaxed show, and switch heat pump 1 in the utility room to heat so the area stays warm while I fold.

evaluation_result.detail: Episode failed: LLM response content was empty
